description: Odds movement tracker. Records initial odds vs latest odds. Movement signals market information flow.

movementSignal.homeShortening: Home odds dropping → market sees home advantage growing → +signal for home
movementSignal.homeDrifting: Home odds rising → market losing confidence in home → -signal for home

recordingGuide.initial: Record odds when first fetched from The Odds API
recordingGuide.latest: Update latest odds each polling cycle
recordingGuide.computeMovement: movement% = (newOdds - oldOdds) / oldOdds * 100 for each outcome
